failures.description: The agent misread or misreasoned over the catalog search result and selected the more expensive smartphone instead of the cheapest returned item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool output at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 first, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 1507389580 at $1157.86, contradicting the tool output and ignoring the lower-priced first item. This is based on available tool output, not missing information or an invalid tool call.
